From: Test Sender <test-sender@example.com>
Date: Thu Oct 23 2014 10:29:03 GMT-0700
Subject: Test Faculty Announcement

Dear CCA Community,

It is with great sadness that I inform you that Yee Jan Bao, senior adjunct professor in Painting/Drawing, died on October 16 after a long illness.

Yee Jan was hired at the college in fall 2003 as an adjunct professor and was promoted to senior adjunct in 2009. He taught in Painting/Drawing and Diversity Studies.

Yee Jan's exhibition record included shows at PS1, Long Island City, New York; the New Museum, New York; and Stephen Rosenberg Gallery, New York. He received grants from the Guggenheim Foundation, the National Endowment for the Arts, and the Pollock-Krasner Foundation.

In addition to CCA, he taught at the School of the Art Institute of Chicago, Rhode Island School of Design, the University of Texas, and the University of Chicago.

Sincerely,
Steve Beal
President
California College of the Arts
